summary: Many designs also equipped with jump jets, further

mechanics.name_guess: Many designs also equipped with jump jets, further
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 142 > lore > Many designs also equipped with jump jets, further
mechanics.excerpt: Many designs also equipped with jump jets, further enhancing their mobillity: The suits combat capabilities make them feared across the Inner Spnere and Clan space_ Even the lightest of power- armor suits mounts support-class weapon while the heaviest suits can mount SRM tubes and even Mech class lasers Most also have functioning hands claws; when coupled with the Pack Field packs_ also known as rucksacks_ can hold enough gear and supplies to keep soldier functioning in the field for at least two weeks They are easily attached t0 oad bearing vest packframe and are even easier t0 remove.
